ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "algorithm" INTEGER /* Type of algorithm used (e.g., ball tree, KD tree) */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hyperparameters of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("model_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hyperparameters */,
  "leaf_size" INTEGER /* Leaf size of the model */,
  "neighbors" INTEGER /* Number of neighbors for the model */,
  "param_p" INTEGER /* Parameter p for the model */,
  "weights" TEXT /* Weight type used (e.g., uniform, distance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluation_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("evaluation_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the evaluation metric */,
  "mean_fit_time" REAL /* Mean fit time for the model */,
  "mean_test_nmse" REAL /* Mean test NMSE for the model */,
  "rank_test_nmse" INTEGER /* Rank of the model based on test NMSE */,
  "mean_test_r2" REAL /* Mean test R2 for the model */,
  "rank_test_r2" INTEGER /* Rank of the model based on test R2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)
